final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing illustration of a basketball dunk scene.

Style/medium: needs a "热血动漫" (hot-blooded anime) aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a player mid-air performing a slam dunk, with dynamic motion blur conveying speed and power
Subject: must include a basketball player in mid-air dunking, sweat droplets flying, crowd cheering in background
Scene/backdrop: must include a basketball court with cheering crowd and camera flashes
Lighting/mood: needs a high-energy, passionate atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs dynamic motion blur effects — exact blur intensity is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the sense of tension and passion throughout
Avoid:
